title: Completely allowed speedruning mod
description: Completely allowed speedruning mod is a mod that adds a cheat panel to speed up speedruns inspired by one of Knarfys videos.
body:
Have you ever wanted to speedrun faster but dont know how? Just use this mod and press N to open the assist menu and you might get a world record! Its totally allowed on speedrun.com too!

Also, I have a feedback form now! Check it out [here](https://forms.gle/yoqKg2okEsmqeWFx6)!

![Proof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7430e1b1e7b9a9f2310a38a76bf46c24f1022d.png)
Also this was inspired by this video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lfIsp642H2o

<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

This mod is a joke. Please do not take it seriously. The actual mod list is [Here](https://mods.tildejustin.dev/?version=1.16.1&run=rsg&os=windows)

</details>
